message:
test(labruntime): port session_correlation/telemetry/recorder_lexical_ingest tests (ft-22x4r)

- session_correlation_labruntime.rs: 1 test (correlate+persist with override)
- telemetry_labruntime.rs: 1 test (collector run and shutdown)
- recorder_lexical_ingest_labruntime.rs: 2 tests (full pipeline, incremental resume)

Skipped metrics_labruntime: metrics module has pre-existing compile errors
under asupersync-runtime (TcpListener/shutdown API mismatch).
